# fivenines_incidents (Data Source)

Lists all incidents in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all incidents
data "fivenines_incidents" "all" {}

# Output open incidents
output "open_incidents" {
  value = [for inc in data.fivenines_incidents.all.incidents : inc if inc.status != "resolved"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `incidents` (Attributes List) List of incidents. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--incidents))

<a id="nestedatt--incidents"></a>
### Nested Schema for `incidents`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `duration_seconds` (Number) Duration of the incident in seconds.
- `ended_at` (String) When the incident ended.
- `host_id` (String) Associated host ID.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier.
- `started_at` (String) When the incident started.
- `status` (String) Current status (triggered, acknowledged, muted, resolved).
- `summary` (String) Incident summary.
- `task_id` (String) Associated task ID.
- `title` (String) Incident title.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `workflow_id` (String) Workflow that created this incident.
